emails.subject: Chevron - Winter
emails.body: Chevron Winter Lee, On deal 413447 (Chevron Olefins), we have a flex nom of 6,000 to 12,000/day. Is this a monthly nom or daily nom? Will we have a swing deal with them for the winter? The current swing deal is for Oct only. For Oct, they have pulled an average of 16,000/day. D

emails.subject: Re: Chevron - Winter
emails.body: Re: Chevron Winter Its a monthly nom for 413447 you're right the swing deal 413462 needs to be extended to match the term of 413447, as does the buyback 413472 Daren J Farmer 10/18/2000 03:48 PM
